title: Super Mario Bros.
description: The legendary platformer! Help Mario save Princess Peach from the clutches of Bowser.

title: Henry Stickmin: Breaking the Bank
description: The first installment of the Henry Stickmin series. Help Henry break into a high-security bank!

title: Henry Stickmin: Escaping the Prison
description: The second installment of the Henry Stickmin series. Henry is in prison, and it's up to you to help him escape using various gadgets and choices!

title: Henry Stickmin: Stealing the Diamond
description: The third installment of the Henry Stickmin series. Help Henry pull off a daring heist to steal a massive diamond from a museum!

title: Henry Stickmin: Infiltrating the Airship
description: The fourth installment of the Henry Stickmin series. Infiltrate a massive airship and decide the fate of the Toppat Clan!

title: Henry Stickmin: Fleeing the Complex
description: The fifth installment of the Henry Stickmin series. Henry is trapped in a high-security prison complex known as The Wall. Help him escape!
